heading: Amounts included in gross income of foreign controlled United States shareholders
label: 951B Amounts included in gross income of foreign controlled United States shareholders
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 119–21, title VII, § 70353(d)139 Stat. 210July 4, 2025“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall apply to taxable years of foreign corporations beginning after .”section 958 of this titleDecember 31, 2025

Construction, , , provided that:Pub. L. 119–21, title VII, § 70353(f)139 Stat. 210July 4, 2025“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall not be construed to create any inference with respect to the proper application of any provision of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 with respect to taxable years beginning before the taxable years to which such amendments apply.”section 958 of this title

Special Rule, , , provided that:Pub. L. 119–21, title VII, § 70353(e)139 Stat. 210July 4, 2025“(1).—In generalExcept to the extent provided by the Secretary of the Treasury (or the Secretary’s delegate), the effective date of any amendment to the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 shall be applied by treating references to United States shareholders as including references to foreign controlled United States shareholders, and by treating references to controlled foreign corporations as including references to foreign controlled foreign corporations.“(2).—DefinitionsAny term used in paragraph (1) which is used in subpart F of part III of subchapter N of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 (as amended by this section) shall have the meaning given such term in such subpart.”
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 119–21, title VII, § 70353(d)139 Stat. 210July 4, 2025“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall apply to taxable years of foreign corporations beginning after .”section 958 of this titleDecember 31, 2025

L. 119–21, title VII, § 70353(f)139 Stat. 210July 4, 2025“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section and amending ] shall not be construed to create any inference with respect to the proper application of any provision of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 with respect to taxable years beginning before the taxable years to which such amendments apply.”section 958 of this title

Special Rule, , , provided that:Pub. L. 119–21, title VII, § 70353(e)139 Stat. 210July 4, 2025“(1).—In generalExcept to the extent provided by the Secretary of the Treasury (or the Secretary’s delegate), the effective date of any amendment to the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 shall be applied by treating references to United States shareholders as including references to foreign controlled United States shareholders, and by treating references to controlled foreign corporations as including references to foreign controlled foreign corporations.“(2).—DefinitionsAny term used in paragraph (1) which is used in subpart F of part III of subchapter N of chapter 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 (as amended by this section) shall have the meaning given such term in such subpart.”

children.label: A
children.text: by substituting “foreign controlled United States shareholder” for “United States shareholder” each place it appears therein, and

children.label: B
children.text: by substituting “foreign controlled foreign corporation” for “controlled foreign corporation” each place it appears therein, and

children.label: A
children.text: by treating each reference to “United States shareholder” in such section as including a reference to such shareholder, and

children.label: B
children.text: by treating each reference to “controlled foreign corporation” in such section as including a reference to such foreign controlled foreign corporation.

children.heading: Foreign controlled United States shareholder
children.label: b Foreign controlled United States shareholder

children.text: section 951(b) were applied by substituting “more than 50 percent” for “10 percent or more”, and
section 958(b) were applied without regard to paragraph (4) thereof.
by substituting “foreign controlled United States shareholders” for “United States shareholders”, and
by substituting “section 958(b) (other than paragraph (4) thereof)” for “section 958(b)”.

to treat a foreign controlled United States shareholder or a foreign controlled foreign corporation as a United States shareholder or as a controlled foreign corporation, respectively, for purposes of provisions of this title other than this subpart (including any reporting requirement), and
with respect to the treatment of foreign controlled foreign corporations that are passive foreign investment companies (as defined in section 1297).
